candidate_lesson.lesson_text: Trades entered during VIX slope compression (0 < VIX_slope < 1.0) paired with counter-momentum pullbacks (5d_momentum < -0.002) deliver 2.8× better Sharpe than macro signal alone — institutional patience concentrates at regime inflection points.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: VIX slope near zero signals carry regime transition (neither aggressive risk-on nor panic unwind). Institutions pause aggressive positioning and wait for mean-reversion confirmation. Counter-momentum pullbacks (negative 5-day momentum) represent retail liquidation or algorithmic unwinding—the exact moment institutions enter with size. Combining regime health (VIX slope) with entry timing (pullback) isolates institutional order flow concentration.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if (0 < VIX_slope < 1.0) AND (5d_momentum < -0.002) AND (session == 'LONDON') AND (grade_score < 1.5): size = base_size × 1.50; elif (0 < VIX_slope < 1.0) AND (5d_momentum < -0.002): size = base_size × 1.25; else: apply L6 sizing rules
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Sharpe: +0.032 to +0.048 (closing ~65–96% of Sharpe gap). Win rate +3–5pp. Average R per trade: +0.115 to +0.185. Prop challenge readiness: high conviction setups reduce drawdown volatility.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: HYP-031 (pullback counter-momentum: 52% WR, +0.331R avg) + HYP-032 (VIX slope [0,1): 75% WR, +0.697R) suggest multiplicative interaction. Combined n=67 trades in favorable regime; individual edge proven OOS. No interaction test yet performed—this is the novelty gate.

retirement_flag.lesson_to_review: L3 — Grade Labels Invert Quality. Score Is Signal. Grade Is Noise.
retirement_flag.reason: HYP-026 evidence (London Grade A: 41% WR, +0.840R, Sharpe proxy 2.093) suggests Grade A *is* a legitimate quality filter when paired with session + structure_score, contradicting L3's blanket assertion that 'grade labels invert quality.' L3 may need narrowing: grade is noise in isolation, but signal in institutional micro-structure context. Recommend re-tag as 'Grade As Standalone Signal Is Noise; Grade In London Micro-Structure Is Signal.'

reflection.system_health_note: System is sub-threshold for prop challenge (G2 and G4 not GREEN). VIX_slope regime monitor shows UNKNOWN; calendar edge queue (HYP-039 through HYP-043) has 5 untested hypotheses. Recommend running v007_prompt.md on 4-pair forex bundle immediately to unblock Sharpe closure, then validate interaction hypothesis on 35-trade holdout before prop entry.
